data.title: ETH Whale's Long Position on Hyperliquid Shows $3.11 Million Unrealized Profit
data.description: An Ethereum (ETH) whale has accumulated an unrealized profit of $3.11 million from a long position on the Hyperliquid platform. According to NS3.AI, the position comprises 80,000 ETH, valued at approximately $182 million. This position was initiated from two separate wallets, with an average entry price of around $2,265.

data.title: Analyst Suggests Bitcoin Yet to Reach Bear-Market Bottom
data.description: On-chain analyst Axel Adler Jr. has indicated that Bitcoin has not yet experienced the significant decline typically seen at the bottom of previous bear markets. According to NS3.AI, Adler's model, which is based on four past market cycles, suggests that the current market has not yet entered its final phase.

data.title: Republican Governors Aim to Influence Redistricting Ahead of Midterms
data.description: Republican governors in Alabama, South Carolina, and Tennessee have announced plans to advocate for congressional redistricting that would benefit their party as the U.S. midterm elections approach in November. According to NS3.AI, public opinion analysis indicates that Republicans are facing a challenging battle to maintain control of the House.

data.title: Trump's approval ratings are low; Republicans are making a push to redraw gerrymandering.
data.description: The Republican governors of Alabama, South Carolina, and Tennessee announced on May 1 that they would push for a redistricting of congressional districts favorable to their parties. With the US midterm elections scheduled for November, analysts believe that due to soaring oil prices caused by the Iran conflict and President Trump's low approval ratings, the Republicans will face a tough battle if they want to maintain their slim majority in the House of Representatives. (Dongxin News Agency)

data.title: Scammers Impersonate Bank Representatives, Leading to $41,000 Loss
data.description: Richard Runyan reported that individuals pretending to be Bank of America representatives deceived him into withdrawing approximately $41,000 and surrendering the money. According to NS3.AI, Runyan expressed that this financial setback jeopardizes his home, prompting him to seek assistance from the community via GoFundMe.

data.title: Spirit Airlines Shuts Down Amid Fuel Cost Surge
data.description: Spirit Airlines ceased all operations on May 2, 2026, after 34 years of service, due to a surge in fuel costs linked to the U.S.-Iran War, according to BeInCrypto. The conflict caused jet fuel prices to double, adding $10 million to $15 million weekly to Spirit's expenses. The airline, which had filed for Chapter 11 in 2024 and 2025, was preparing for Chapter 7 liquidation. A $500 million federal aid package failed to materialize as bondholders and lawmakers resisted. Spirit's closure affects up to 17,000 jobs and reduces U.S. domestic capacity by 1.8% to 3.4%.

data.title: Paradigm partners proposed the PACTs mechanism to provide a protection path for quantum-fragile Bitcoin addresses.
data.description: Paradigm General Partner Dan Robinson proposed the "Provable Address Control Timestamps" (PACTs) mechanism, designed to provide a protection path for Bitcoin addresses under the potential threat of quantum computing. This scheme allows holders to generate address control proofs via BIP-322 and combine this with random salt to generate on-chain commitments, using OpenTimestamps for time anchoring, thus establishing proof of ownership without disclosing wallet information. If quantum-vulnerable addresses are frozen via a soft fork in the future, users can submit STARK zero-knowledge proofs to unlock their assets upon spending. This mechanism also provides a potential recovery path for wallets derived from BIP-32, but its implementation still relies on Bitcoin introducing STARK verification capabilities and gaining community consensus. (CoinDesk)

data.title: AI TRENDS | ChatGPT Users Can Now Access OpenClaw Services
data.description: Sam Altman announced that users can now log into OpenClaw using their ChatGPT accounts and access subscription services. According to Foresight News, OpenAI has introduced the 'Codex Pets' feature for the Codex desktop application. This feature includes various preset pets, and users can utilize the hatch-pet skill to allow AI to automatically generate custom pets with attributes such as species, personality, and rarity. The current Codex session's status and progress summary can be displayed in real-time, enabling users to monitor Agent progress while switching windows.

data.title: Bitcoin's Path to $100,000 May Not Require New Narratives, Says Analyst
data.description:
Michael van de Poppe, founder of MN Trading Capital, suggests that Bitcoin's return to the $100,000 mark might not need new market narratives to drive it. According to Odaily, he believes that narratives will naturally form as prices rise. Currently, market attention has shifted towards areas like AI, putting short-term pressure on Bitcoin. However, from a mathematical and statistical perspective, the current price range still holds value for accumulation.

Data indicates that Bitcoin has not reached the $100,000 level for nearly five months. The price has risen from a low of approximately $60,000 in February this year to around $78,000, marking a 14.49% increase over the past 30 days. The market is closely watching potential catalysts such as Federal Reserve interest rate policies, regulatory developments, and inflows into Bitcoin spot ETFs. However, some opinions suggest that even if the U.S. CLARITY Act is implemented, its direct impact on Bitcoin's price may be limited.

data.title: MN Trading Capital Founder: Bitcoin's Return to $100,000 May Not Require a New Narrative
data.description: Michael van de Poppe, founder of MN Trading Capital, stated that Bitcoin's return to the $100,000 mark may not require a new market narrative; the narrative will naturally emerge as prices rise. He pointed out that the market's focus has shifted to areas like AI, putting relative pressure on Bitcoin's short-term performance. However, from a mathematical and statistical perspective, the current price range still possesses accumulation value. Data shows that Bitcoin has not reached the $100,000 mark for nearly five months, with the price rebounding from a low of approximately $60,000 in February to approximately $78,000, a 30-day increase of about 14.49%. The market is generally focused on potential catalysts such as the Federal Reserve's interest rate policy, regulatory developments, and inflows into Bitcoin spot ETFs. However, some believe that even if the US CLARITY Act is passed, its direct impact on Bitcoin's price will be limited. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETFs See Significant Inflows on May 1
data.description: Bitcoin spot ETFs experienced substantial inflows on May 1, according to PANews. Data from SoSoValue indicates that the total net inflow reached $630 million on that day. BlackRock's IBIT led the inflows with $284 million, while Fidelity's FBTC followed with $213 million. As of now, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs stands at $103.785 billion, with a net asset ratio of 6.66%. The historical cumulative net inflow has risen to $58.718 billion.

data.description: On May 02, 2026, 04:51 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,300 USDT and is now trading at 2,299.699951 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.83% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Taiwanese Legislator Proposes Bitcoin Allocation from Foreign Exchange Reserves
data.description: Taiwanese legislator Ko Ju-Chun has called on the executive branch to consider allocating a portion of Taiwan's $602 billion foreign exchange reserves to Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, Ko also requested the central bank to prepare a report within one month regarding stablecoins and the broader digital asset reserves. This proposal reflects growing interest in integrating digital assets into national financial strategies.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $101 million yesterday, with Fidelity's FETH ETF leading the way with a net inflow of $49.3942 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $101 million yesterday (May 1st, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a net inflow of $49.3942 million. FETH's historical total net inflow has reached $2.289 billion. This was followed by the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a net inflow of $43.1592 million. ETHA's historical total net outflow has reached $100 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $13.603 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.93%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $12.016 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $630 million yesterday, with BlackRock's IBIT leading the way with a net inflow of $284 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $630 million yesterday (May 1st, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF IBIT saw the largest single-day net inflow, at $284 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $327 million. The Fidelity ETF FBTC followed with a net inflow of $213 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $11.082 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $103.785 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total Bitcoin market capitalization) of 6.66%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $58.718 billion.

data.title: Reform Party leader George Farage has been accused of a conflict of interest after receiving a £5 million grant to push for a crypto tax cut proposal.
data.description: Nigel Farage, leader of the UK's Reform Party, has been accused of a conflict of interest by the opposition. He received a £5 million personal donation from crypto investor Christopher Harborne in 2024. Subsequently, in May 2025, the Reform Party proposed a draft bill to regulate the crypto industry, aiming to reduce the stamp duty on crypto transactions from 24% to 10%, establish a national Bitcoin reserve, and lower capital gains tax on crypto assets. Farage has admitted to receiving the donation, while the Reform Party maintains that policy-making is unrelated to the donor. Furthermore, Harborne donated another £12 million to the party last year, and crypto businessman Ben Delo donated £4 million this year. Farage currently faces charges of violating House of Commons rules, which could result in suspension from his seat and trigger a by-election. (Financial Times)
